Operation 'getlocations' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is vague about what 'location' means in NHL context. Missing description entirely makes it unclear what data is returned and when an AI agent should use this endpoint. Improved summary specifies NHL arenas/venues, and description explains the purpose, return value, and use case.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve NHL arena and venue locations
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves information about NHL arena and venue locations, including venue names, cities, and geographic details. Returns a list of all NHL locations. Useful for understanding where games are played and venue-specific information.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about what 'location' means in NHL context. Missing description entirely makes it unclear what data is returned and when an AI agent should use this endpoint. Improved summary specifies NHL arenas/venues, and description explains the purpose, return value, and use case.

message: Operation 'getseasoninfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary 'Get season data' is too generic. Missing description leaves unclear what season information is available and when to use this endpoint. Improved summary specifies current NHL season, and description explains what season metadata is returned and its relationship to other operations.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves information about the current NHL season, including season year, start and end dates, and season type (regular season, playoffs, etc.). Returns season metadata that provides context for schedule and standings queries. Useful for determining the active season and its timeline.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get season data' is too generic. Missing description leaves unclear what season information is available and when to use this endpoint. Improved summary specifies current NHL season, and description explains what season metadata is returned and its relationship to other operations.
